verse_text: So verily with every difficulty there is relief
Indeed with hardship comes ease

arabic_text: لَا يُكَلِّفُ اللَّهُ نَفْسًا إِلَّا وُسْعَهَا
verse_text: Allah does not burden a soul beyond that it can bear
Verily in the remembrance of Allah do hearts find rest
Do not despair of the mercy of Allah
Do not lose hope nor fall into despair
Be patient indeed Allah is with the patient

arabic_text: وَمَن يَتَوَكَّلْ عَلَى اللَّهِ فَهُوَ حَسْبُهُ
verse_text: And whoever relies upon Allah then He is sufficient for him
Do not despair of the mercy of Allah He forgives all sins
Seek help through patience and prayer indeed Allah is with the patient
Do not mock others nor insult one another

arabic_text: وَاعْبُدُوا اللَّهَ وَلَا تُشْرِكُوا بِهِ شَيْئًا
verse_text: Be good to parents and to relatives and neighbors
Those who restrain anger and pardon people Allah loves the good doers
Be grateful to Me and to your parents to Me is the final destination
So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny
If you are grateful I will surely increase you in favor
But as for the favor of your Lord report it
Our Lord do not impose blame upon us if we forget or make error
Allah is sufficient for us and He is the best disposer of affairs

arabic_text: إِنَّمَا الْمُؤْمِنُونَ الَّذِينَ إِذَا ذُكِرَ اللَّهُ وَجِلَتْ قُلُوبُهُمْ
verse_text: The believers are those whose hearts tremble when Allah is mentioned
